programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A solution to a problem for swimmers; a tool to help cat lovers find their perfect match; a product designed to encourage children to wash their hands.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: After a night of partying, the Ohana crew prepare for a new group of charter guests. A bad decision by Kate puts Amy and Ben in a bind as they struggle to create a birthday celebration for a charter guest.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After a Florida man fails to show up for work, police believe that he left town of his own volition. As years go by, town rumors lead police to unearth a gruesome crime that had been long since buried.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Garcelle is in the hot seat when a distraught Erika leaves the trip early, but she refuses to roast alone. On their last day in the desert, the women wake up to a stunning exposé that leaves Kyle, Lisa and Dorit with questions. Meanwhile, Sutton calls an emergency meeting among the group - but not everyone makes the guest list.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A man claims he rented his former friend a room in his home and is now suing him for $5,000 for unpaid rent!

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Comic Nikki Glaser; actor Randall Park; businessperson Bozoma Saint John; Nathaniel Rateliff & The Night Sweats perform.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Shockwaves from an unexpected news article continue to spread as the ladies try to piece together the truth; Garcelle serves up a Haitian holiday meal for her family; When Kyle gathers the ladies for Christmas dinner, holiday cheer turns to jeer.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: LA
programme.desc: Josh Altman heads to an exclusive enclave to try to snag a record-breaking listing. Madison gains some momentum with a potential buyer, but his relationship with James might crash the deal.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A learning platform to empower students to reach their creative potential through art; an oat-based spread; a boozy spin on a wedding day essential.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: Kelley asks Jennice out on a date, and it doesn't go according to plan. The new guests turn the Ohana sky deck into a stock trading floor. Logan turns the charm towards the primary guest's girlfriend.

programme.title: Next Gen Nyc
programme.desc: Ariana and Riley reconnect after a decade apart. Charlie struggles to hide his irritation as a Brooklyn night out shifts from cocktails to chaos. Brooks and Gia update their moms, Meredith and Teresa,.

programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: Carl gets back in the game with a new girl. Kyle and Craig finally address the elephant in the room. A late-night rendezvous creates drama for the entire house.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After a loving father is found dead in the bedroom of his Oklahoma home by his ex-wife, police must unpack a complex family dynamic and a loyalty based on greed in order to get answers.

programme.title: Deadly Waters With Captain Lee
programme.desc: Three missing fingers point to the identity of a body found off the coast of Catalina Island, plunging authorities into the mysterious investigation of a wealthy mogul, luxurious yacht and a manhunt for a killer hiding in an unlikely place.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: Kelley asks Jennice out on a date, and it doesn't go according to plan. The new guests turn the Ohana sky deck into a stock trading floor. Logan turns the charm towards the primary guest's girlfriend.

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programme.sub-title: The Kelly Clarkson Show S7 Ep129
programme.desc: Kelly Clarkson presents the biggest newsmakers and names in film, television and music; as well as emerging new talent and everyday people who are beacons of hope in their communities.

programme.desc: Josh Altman heads to an exclusive enclave to try to snag a record-breaking listing. Madison gains some momentum with a potential buyer, but his relationship with James might crash the deal.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Guests include Justin Hartley.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Erika and Lisa help Kyle celebrate her birthday, but the festivities are short-lived when Erika shares more information about her marriage; Crystal hosts a launch party for Lisa's lip line and tensions between the ladies come to a head.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: LA
programme.desc: Josh Flagg makes his way to the Valley, where he faces off with some local agents. The Brits have a blast from the past, and Madison and Heather try to salvage their friendship.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: An easy-to-use organic skin care product line born from a personal need; confidence-boosting swimwear; a convenient tool that helps combat an annoying problem.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: Tensions within Ohana's crew reach their boiling point as they prepare for the season's final charter. Once the Ohana returns to port for the last time, the crew say their final goodbyes and tears flow.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple is shot in their North Carolina home, leaving the husband dead, investigators must determine if it’s a robbery gone wrong or something more sinister. As the evidence piles up, it reveals a jealous lover hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Dateline International
programme.sub-title: The Murder Of Lorenzen Wright Part 1
programme.desc: The murder of former NBA star and hometown hero Lorenzen Wright sends shockwaves through the city of Memphis.

programme.title: Dateline International
programme.sub-title: The Murder Of Lorenzen Wright Part 2
programme.desc: The murder of former NBA star and hometown hero Lorenzen Wright sends shockwaves through the city of Memphis.

programme.title: Killer Relationship with Faith Jenkins
programme.desc: To prevent the exposure of a twisted secret, a seemingly solid marriage between two deeply religious people is destroyed and two lives are lost forever in the cold-blooded and desperate killings of a beautiful mother and daughter.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: Tensions within Ohana's crew reach their boiling point as they prepare for the season's final charter. Once the Ohana returns to port for the last time, the crew say their final goodbyes and tears flow.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: It's a family feud on today's Judge Jerry as two cousins find themselves embroiled in litigation over breach of contract. It's quite a pickle so don't miss Judge Jerry's decision.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: LA
programme.desc: Josh Altman has baby on the brain. Josh Flagg is ready to waltz down the aisle. James has unresolved issues with Madison over a huge listing. A new realtor proves she's not to be messed with.

programme.desc: Guest shark Emma Grede; a line of functional apparel and accessories; a healthy superfood product; a way to store jewelry when on the go.
